name: Vehicle landing page returns a not-found page for an unknown vehicle slug
description: Verifies /arac/[slug] calls notFound() for a slug that doesn't resolve to a known brand/model, instead of crashing or silently rendering an empty page.

planSteps.description: The page shows a 404 / not-found state (Next.js default 'This page could not be found' or an equivalent not-found message), not the vehicle landing page layout
